---
title: 'The Power  eats you when used selfishly. But empow...'
date: '2015-07-20T06:59:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'It''s Author Fun'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '6276720909442483698'
blogger_filename: '/2015/07/the-power-eats-you-when-used-selfishly.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/It_s Author Fun/feed.atom'
---

The Power eats you when used selfishly. But empowers you when used for others.
